author: xhydros
description: AI Codex ChatBot sidebar with vault context, references, PDF text, local CLI fallback, sessions, and backups. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.description: AI chat sidebar with vault context, references, PDF text, local CLI fallback, sessions, and backups.
manifest.name: Cortex Chat

name: Cortex Chat

releases.author: xhydros
releases.description:
## Cortex Chat 1.5.5

### Changed
- Simplified the Codex setup assistant with a single guided **Prepare Cortex** flow.
- Moved technical setup details behind diagnostics so normal users see less noise.
- Added a cleaner basic settings section and collapsed the full configuration under **Advanced**.
- Kept existing Windows/Linux/macOS Codex execution logic intact, including Linux Flatpak host detection and repair flow.

### Fixed
- Restored missing bundled Codex CLI helpers required by local execution:
  - `buildCodexExecArgs`
  - `detectCodexPlatform`
- Fixed local Windows execution error: `buildCodexExecArgsSafe is not a function`.

### Release Notes
- `manifest.json` bumped to `1.5.5`.
- `versions.json` updated for Obsidian `1.8.0`.
- Tested on Windows local setup flow.
- Linux behavior was preserved for validation on a Linux machine before further changes.
releases.name: Cortex Chat 1.5.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Cortex Chat 1.5.4

### Windows hotfix

- Fixes Codex CLI detection on Windows after installing with npm.
- Adds explicit Windows Codex strategies through `cmd.exe /d /s /c codex.cmd`.
- Prevents Flatpak diagnostics from running or appearing on Windows.
- Fixes Windows OAuth launch to use the resolved Codex command strategy.
- Cleans stale Flatpak diagnostic entries when Windows resolves Codex successfully.

### Verification

- `node --check main.js`
- `node --check lib/settings.js`
- `node --check lib/i18n.js`
- `node scripts/bundle-main.js`
- `node scripts/prepare-release.js`
- `node --check release/main.js`
releases.name: Cortex Chat 1.5.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Cortex Chat 1.5.3

### Codex setup assistant

- Improves operating system detection for the Codex setup assistant.
- Adds Linux-specific Codex CLI resolution for GUI environments where Obsidian does not inherit the terminal PATH.
- Adds Flatpak-aware Codex detection for Obsidian on Linux.
- Supports `flatpak-spawn --host` when Obsidian Flatpak has permission to call the host runtime.
- Shows a clear repair command when Obsidian Flatpak blocks host execution.

### OAuth and Codex execution

- Fixes Codex CLI execution through Flatpak host bridge.
- Ensures OAuth status checks and Codex test execution use the resolved Codex strategy.
- Keeps npm optional when Codex CLI is already installed and executable.

### Setup UI

- Adds compact setup diagnostics.
- Adds full diagnostics toggle.
- Adds setup log cleanup.
- Reduces noisy repeated setup log entries.

### Windows compatibility

- Preserves the existing Windows flow using `cmd.exe`, `npm.cmd`, and the current OAuth terminal launch behavior.
- Adds platform compatibility checks so Linux/Flatpak command strategies are never reused on Windows.
releases.name: Cortex Chat 1.5.3

releases.author: xhydros
releases.description:
## Cortex Chat 1.5.1

### Mejoras principales
- El contexto por carpeta ahora carga archivos de forma recursiva, no solo notas Markdown.
- Soporte de contexto para `.md`, `.pdf`, `.txt`, `.csv`, `.tsv`, `.json`, `.xml`, `.yaml`, `.yml`, `.log`, `.html` y `.htm`.
- Nuevo presupuesto configurable de contexto por carpeta para evitar prompts excesivos.
- El panel de detalles agrupa mejor las fuentes de carpeta y separa claramente RAG de contexto explícito.

### UX y chat
- Las referencias `@` ahora soportan nombres con espacios, guiones y títulos largos.
- `@Acta - ...` ya no corta el autocompletado al escribir espacios.
- `Enter` o `Tab` aceptan la sugerencia activa cuando el menú de referencias está abierto.
- La barra inferior del composer ahora se adapta mejor en sidebars estrechas y evita solapamientos.

### Skills y contexto
- Mejoras en el flujo inicial de Skills como instrucciones Markdown seguras dentro de la vault.
- Drag & drop de archivos/notas/carpetas mantiene el contexto explícito sin depender de rutas externas.

### Verificación
- Build autocontenido regenerado.
- `node --check` validado en `main.js`, `release/main.js` y la instalación local.
- Release assets incluidos: `main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`.

releases.author: xhydros
releases.description:
Cortex Chat UI and context workbench update.

- Adds context manifest per response
- Adds context source workbench
- Adds local RAG index
- Adds approved note insertion flow with backups
- Adds prompt profiles and quick commands
releases.name: Improvements at context
